variants.title: Mann Filter PF 1025 Oil Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P550023
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter PF 1025 Oil Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P550023
variants.description: MANN-FILTER oil filters: Top filtration performance and optimal cleaning protect the engine against wear caused by impurities and combustion residues in the oil. Filter media and high-quality sealing materials that are individually tailored to the intended application offer optimum protection over the entire maintenance interval.
specifications: Style: Oil Filter, Dimension A: 108.0 mm, Dimension B: 13.0 mm, Dimension C: 13.0 mm, Dimension H: 203.0 mm, Outer Diameter: 91.9 mm, Inner Diameter: 15.0 mm, Length: 134.9 mm

variants.title: Donaldson P550023 Fuel Cartridge
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P550023 Fuel Cartridge is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
specifications: Style: Fuel Cartridge, Outer Diameter: 91.9 mm, Inner Diameter: 15.0 mm, Length: 134.9 mm
